summary: Backend API testing completed for iteration 3. All 43 tests passed. Bug fixes verified: (1) Message send endpoints working, (2) Session cancellation with mandatory reason working, (3) Message delete working. New slot management feature tested and working after fixing MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in POST /api/teacher/slots endpoint - was returning _id in response which is not JSON serializable
Bug Fix #1 (Message send) - POST /api/messages/send and POST /api/messages/send-to-teacher both work correctly with proper role validation
Bug Fix #2 (Session cancellation) - PUT /api/sessions/{id}/cancel works with mandatory reason field (min 3 chars)
Bug Fix #3 (Message delete) - DELETE /api/messages/{id} works correctly with sender-only permission
New Feature (Slots management) - POST /api/teacher/slots and DELETE /api/teacher/slots/{id} work correctly
All teacher endpoints properly require authentication and teacher role
Admin-only endpoints (announcements, all-bookings) are properly protected
test_credentials: Test users (teacher, student, admin) created with session tokens for testing
seed_data_creation: Test users and sessions created via mongosh, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All backend APIs are working. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization issue in slot management endpoint. The frontend changes (loading states, functional updates in setMessages) are UX improvements that work with the backend APIs. Test file updated with 8 new tests for slot management feature.
